main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'microbial biofilm during 28d stagnation no preservation'.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (sílice SCAL, CaCO3, orgánico, MECH defect) anclados.

recommended_action.justification: ACCIÓN CRÍTICA: 'Circulate sodium hypochlorite 200 mg/L through the RO system for 1 hour' — choque con hipoclorito directo a la membrana.

requested_data.justification: Pide SEM/autopsy membrana surface — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: SEM no biofilm + ATP elevado → switch.

automatic_fails_triggered.reference: Recomendar choque con hipoclorito en alimentación a RO para 'desinfectar la membrana'
automatic_fails_triggered.justification: Cita: 'Circulate a biocide solution (sodium hypochlorite 200 mg/L active chlorine) through the RO system for 1 hour'. Hipoclorito 200 mg/L circulado por el RO durante 1h = choque con hipoclorito en alimentación a RO — match exacto del case_specific fail. Destruye irreversiblemente la PA.
